name: useCopy
description: Hook that manages copying text with status reset

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Delay in ms before resetting copied status

source.source: * @param {number} [delay=1000] Delay in ms before resetting copied status

tokens.name: [delay=1000]
tokens.description: Delay in ms before resetting copied status

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the copied value, status and copy function
